title: castilleja fruticosa
intro: Castilleja fruticosa, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Castilleja fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for internal and external use.
